name: CohereConnector
description: Connects Shielva to the Cohere LLM API (Chat, Embed, Rerank, Classify, Tokenize/Detokenize, Models, Datasets, RAG Connectors, Fine-tuning) using a Bearer API key. v2 inference (chat/embed/rerank) + v1 utilities (classify/tokenize/datasets/finetuning).

install_fields.label: Cohere API Key
install_fields.placeholder: Paste your Cohere production API key
install_fields.help: From Cohere Dashboard → API Keys → Production Key. Sent as `Authorization: Bearer <key>` on every request.

install_fields.label: Cohere API Base URL
install_fields.help: Base URL for the Cohere REST API. The connector appends `/v1/*` or `/v2/*` per endpoint, so paste the root host. Leave blank to use the default.

install_fields.label: Default Chat Model
install_fields.help: Model used by chat() when the caller does not specify one.

install_fields.label: Default Embed Model
install_fields.help: Model used by embed() when the caller does not specify one.

install_fields.label: Rate Limit (requests/min)
install_fields.help: Maximum Cohere API requests per minute. Default 100 matches the production tier; trial keys are typically 5 RPM.

apis.name: Install Connector
apis.description: Validates `api_key` (calls GET /v1/models?page_size=1 to confirm) and persists config. Returns ConnectorStatus(HEALTHY, CONNECTED) on success.

apis.name: Health Check
apis.description: Verifies Cohere API connectivity by listing one model (GET /v1/models?page_size=1).

apis.name: Chat
apis.description: POST /v2/chat — run a Cohere chat completion. Returns the v2 chat response with assistant content.

apis.name: Embed
apis.description: POST /v2/embed — generate vector embeddings for one or more texts.

apis.name: Rerank
apis.description: POST /v2/rerank — rerank documents by relevance to a query.

apis.name: Classify
apis.description: POST /v1/classify — classify inputs using few-shot labelled examples.

apis.name: Tokenize
apis.description: POST /v1/tokenize — return Cohere tokens for `text` under the named model's tokenizer.

apis.name: Detokenize
apis.description: POST /v1/detokenize — convert token IDs back into text under the named model.

apis.name: List Models
apis.description: GET /v1/models — list available Cohere models. Supports paging + endpoint filter.

apis.name: Get Model
apis.description: GET /v1/models/{model_id} — fetch a single model's metadata.

apis.name: List Datasets
apis.description: GET /v1/datasets — list fine-tune datasets uploaded to the Cohere account.

apis.name: Create Dataset
apis.description: POST /v1/datasets — register a new fine-tune dataset envelope. (File upload itself is multipart; the gateway shapes that.)

apis.name: List Cohere RAG Connectors
apis.description: GET /v1/connectors — list Cohere RAG connectors (provider-managed, not Shielva connectors).

apis.name: List Fine-tuned Models
apis.description: GET /v1/finetuning/finetuned-models — list fine-tuned model jobs for the Cohere account.
